# Tool-Call Fine-Tune Lab

Purpose: fine-tuning and eval pipeline for tool-call datasets, BFCL-style tests, and serving checks
Free entry point: free open-source pipeline and sample eval reports
Paid boundary: paid dataset preparation pack, eval report, and private fine-tuning runbook
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/tool-call-finetune-lab/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/tool-call-finetune-lab
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/tool-call-finetune-lab/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/tool-call-finetune-lab/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: https://github.com/KIM3310/tool-call-finetune-lab/issues/new?template=service-inquiry.yml&title=Private+workspace+inquiry%3A+Tool-Call+Fine-Tune+Lab

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for Tool-Call Fine-Tune Lab demo, Tool-Call Fine-Tune Lab system architecture, Tool-Call Fine-Tune Lab developer tool, fine-tuning and eval pipeline for tool-call datasets, BFCL-style tests, and serving checks service.
